Location

Where the Top 100 are based

Each researcher in the Top 100 is grouped by the country of their current institution. Choose a region to see its listing. The map for each region shows where its researchers are based.

North America : 27 researchers

Europe : 26 researchers

Asia and the Pacific : 29 researchers

Other regions : 4 researchers

14 researchers could not be placed on the map because their country is not yet verified.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwirh.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.

Last built June 2026.
